all.en: We are excited to announce the launch of our new employee wellness program.
all.zh: 我們很高興宣布推出全新的員工健康促進計畫。

all.en: The program, called LiveWell at Work, begins on Monday, July 1.
all.zh: 本計畫名為「LiveWell at Work」，將於 7 月 1 日星期一正式啟動。

all.en: It is designed to support the physical, mental, and financial well-being of staff.
all.zh: 本計畫旨在支持員工的身心健康與財務福祉。

all.en: All full-time and part-time employees are eligible to participate.
all.zh: 所有正職與兼職員工皆可參加。

all.en: Family members of employees may also join selected program activities.
all.zh: 員工家屬亦可參加部分指定活動。

all.en: The program offers monthly themes throughout the year.
all.zh: 本計畫整年將推出每月不同的主題活動。

all.en: July will focus on healthy habits and daily movement.
all.zh: 7 月聚焦於健康習慣與每日運動。

all.en: August will highlight stress management and mindfulness techniques.
all.zh: 8 月將著重壓力管理與正念技巧。

all.en: September will introduce financial planning workshops led by certified advisors.
all.zh: 9 月將推出由合格顧問主講的財務規劃工作坊。

all.en: Free on-site fitness classes will be held three times per week.
all.zh: 公司將每週舉辦三次免費現場健身課程。

all.en: Yoga, pilates, and high-intensity sessions will all be available.
all.zh: 課程包含瑜伽、皮拉提斯及高強度訓練。

all.en: Our partner gym will offer a forty percent discount on annual memberships.
all.zh: 合作健身房將提供年度會員 60% 折扣優惠。

all.en: An on-site nurse will be available twice a month for health consultations.
all.zh: 公司每月將安排兩次駐點護理師提供健康諮詢。

all.en: Confidential counseling services are available through our employee assistance program.
all.zh: 員工協助方案亦提供保密心理諮商服務。

all.en: All employees will receive a complimentary wellness kit at the kickoff event.
all.zh: 全體員工將於啟動活動上獲贈一份健康好禮包。

all.en: The kit includes a reusable water bottle, a journal, and a step counter.
all.zh: 好禮包內含環保水壺、筆記本與計步器。

all.en: A wellness portal will let employees track goals and join challenges.
all.zh: 公司將上線健康入口網站，方便員工設定目標並參加挑戰。

all.en: Quarterly team challenges will encourage friendly competition between departments.
all.zh: 每季部門間將舉辦友善競賽以促進良性互動。

all.en: Top participants will be recognized in our quarterly newsletter.
all.zh: 表現優秀者將獲頒於每季電子報中表揚。

all.en: Healthy snack options will be added to all break rooms next month.
all.zh: 下月起所有茶水間將提供更多健康點心選擇。

all.en: The cafeteria menu has been updated with additional vegetarian dishes.
all.zh: 員工餐廳菜單亦已新增多項素食選擇。

all.en: Standing desks can now be requested through the facilities portal.
all.zh: 員工可透過設施申請入口網站申請升降式辦公桌。

all.en: We believe that a healthy workforce is a more engaged and productive one.
all.zh: 我們相信健康的員工才能更投入工作並提升生產力。

all.en: Please join us at the kickoff celebration on July 1 at noon in the lobby.
all.zh: 誠摯邀請您於 7 月 1 日中午至大廳參加啟動慶祝活動。

all.en: For more information, please visit the LiveWell page on our intranet.
all.zh: 更多資訊請瀏覽公司內網的 LiveWell 專頁。

all.en: Annual biometric screenings will be offered free of charge starting in October.
all.zh: 自 10 月起公司將免費提供年度健康檢測。

all.en: Employees who complete five wellness activities will earn an extra paid day off.
all.zh: 完成五項健康活動的員工可獲得一日額外有薪假。

all.en: Smoking cessation support programs are available through our health insurance partner.
all.zh: 本公司健保合作夥伴亦提供戒菸支援計畫。

all.en: Ergonomic workstation assessments can be scheduled with our facilities team.
all.zh: 員工可向設施團隊預約人體工學工作站評估。

all.en: Mental health first aid training will be offered to all interested employees.
all.zh: 心理健康急救訓練將開放有意願的員工報名參加。

all.en: Quarterly health webinars feature leading specialists in their respective fields.
all.zh: 每季健康講座將邀請各領域知名專家主講。

all.en: Walking meetings are encouraged whenever weather and meeting topics allow.
all.zh: 在天氣與會議主題許可下，公司鼓勵以步行方式進行會議。

all.en: Sleep hygiene workshops will be held during November to support better rest.
all.zh: 11 月將舉辦睡眠保健工作坊，協助員工獲得更好的休息。

all.en: Family wellness days will allow employees to bring children for activities each spring.
all.zh: 家庭健康日將於每年春季開放員工攜子女參加活動。

all.en: We genuinely appreciate your commitment to building a healthier workplace community.
all.zh: 我們由衷感謝您共同打造更健康的職場社群。
